ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "station_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "commissioned_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was commissioned */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the event was recorded */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather event (e.g., storm, drought) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event (e.g., damages, casualties) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the query (e.g., date range, station ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station for the statistics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "avg_temp_c" REAL /* Average temperature for the year */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation for the year */,
  "avg_wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Average wind speed for the year */,
  "max_temp_c" REAL /* Maximum temperature for the year */,
  "min_temp_c" REAL /* Minimum temperature for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_statistics_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., warning, advisory) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "expected_temp_c" REAL /* Expected temperature for the forecasted day */,
  "precipitation_chance" REAL /* Chance of precipitation for the forecasted day */,
  "wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Expected wind speed for the forecasted day */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Expected weather condition for the forecasted day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather parameter (e.g., Temperature, Humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter (e.g., Celsius, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Recorded value of the parameter */,
  "quality_control_flags" TEXT /* Flags indicating any quality control issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_geolocation" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geolocation details in a formatted string */,
  "altitude_m" REAL /* Altitude of the station in meters */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the station is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_geolocation_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the station type (e.g., Automated, Manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "measurement_interval" INTEGER /* Measurement interval in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work done */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Person or team responsible for the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather forecast source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
